sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46459" key="zwnioplo/kos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζωνιοπλόκος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n46459.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">plaiting</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">embroidering girdles</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9023.tlg001:p.168" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Thom.Mag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.168</biblScope> </bibl> R.</sense> </entryFree>
